title: OpenAI
overview: OpenAI is an American artificial intelligence research organization founded in 2015. It develops advanced AI systems including GPT language models, DALL-E image generation models, and Sora video generation models.

title: Machine Learning
overview: Machine Learning is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to learn patterns from data and make predictions without being explicitly programmed.

title: RAG Systems
overview: Retrieval-Augmented Generation combines information retrieval with large language models. It retrieves relevant documents and provides them as context to the language model before generating an answer.

title: Physical AI
overview: Physical AI refers to artificial intelligence systems that interact with and operate in the physical world through robots, autonomous vehicles, drones, and smart machines.
